3195070.name: Paint Puzzle Quest
3195070.description:
Color by logic. Solve by strategy.
Paint Puzzle Quest blends the elegance of pattern matching with the fun of color design. Take a blank grid, pick your brushes, and carefully paint rows or columns so the final image matches the target design. With 100 levels from simple to intricate, this is a puzzle journey for thinkers and creators alike. Steam Store

Features

  • 100 crafted levels with escalating challenge Steam Store

  • Grids ranging from small (2×2) to large (10×10) Steam Store

  • Multiple brushes, each tied to a color, to paint rows or columns Steam Store

  • Strategy and creativity combine: plan your moves to match the target design Steam Store

  • Vibrant, colorful visuals and clean UI Steam Store

  • Relaxed pacing — no timers forcing you to rush Steam Store

  • Singleplayer, family-friendly, accessible for all ages Steam Store

About This Game

In Paint Puzzle Quest, your objective is deceptively simple: paint each row or column with a brush so that the colored grid matches a provided design. But as the grids grow larger, the strategy deepens. Which brush do you use? Which row or column first? How do you avoid overwriting needed patterns?

You begin with smaller grids. As you move forward, levels grow in size and complexity, demanding more foresight, planning, and trial. Because there’s no time pressure, you can pause, rethink, and try different sequences until you find the optimal move order.

Visually, the game is bright and clean. The color choices are distinct but harmonious, letting your brain distinguish patterns without confusion. UI and controls are straightforward, putting the focus squarely on the puzzle itself.

Every new level feels fresh—some demand symmetry, others require you to think through chain effects where painting one row influences adjacent ones. This is not just about matching; it’s about foreseeing and managing dependencies.

Whether you play for a few minutes or settle in for an hour, Paint Puzzle Quest is well suited to both short bursts and longer sessions. Its blend of strategic logic, colorful design, and relaxed flow makes it perfect for puzzle lovers and casual players alike.
